prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: Shadowrun / Sixth World inspired cyberpunk urban-fantasy atlas for the terrain type continent_archipelago.
Scene/backdrop: one dominant cyberpunk continent with a large uneven offshore archipelago, megacorp arcology towers, sprawling metropolitan districts, barrens slums, matrix access node hubs, gang territory borders, smuggling docks, offshore corporate enclaves, awakened island forests, toxic refinery islands, neon ports and black-market sea routes.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated cyberpunk atlas, dark map with neon highlights, rain-slicked dystopian atmosphere, holo-billboard glow, Matrix hex overlays, corporate zone cartography, urban fantasy mood.
Composition/framing: tall portrait map; main continent off-center with an irregular archipelago sweeping along the coast in a diagonal arc; islands include tiny smuggler islets, corporate arcology islands, reef belts, large sprawl islands, crescent island chains and toxic industrial platforms; include digital compass, circuit border, transit routes, gang markers, corporate icons and Matrix node overlays without readable text.
Geography constraints: islands must be irregularly distributed and varied in size and shape, with channels, black lagoons, reefs, industrial ports, atolls, artificial platforms and broken shores; continental coastline should include peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, curved coasts, polluted deltas, seawalls, capes, toxic estuaries and fragmented cliffs; show megacity sprawl, awakened forests, deserts, mountains, toxic wetlands, coastal docks and barrens wasteland.
Avoid: uniform island grid, clean utopian sci-fi, simple round islands, medieval fantasy map, modern satellite image, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
